LevelQuestData.Description:
Travel Log Tutorial
Finish 1-7 to finish the Travel Log tutorial!

Unlock Bonk Choy!
Bonk Choy: this pugilisitic plant beats zombies up AND backwards!

Unlock Pyramid of Doom!
PYRAMID OF DOOM: Bash zombies for rewards in this endless Egyptian survival mode!

Unlock Snow pea!
Snow Pea: Slow zombies down and extinguish their flame!

Unlock Repeater!
Why shoot one pea when you can shoot two for twice the firepower with Repeater!

ChallengeLevelQuestData.Description:
Beat Bonus Level AE-16-1!
Are you prepared to beat the original version of AE-16?

LevelQuestData.Description:
Unlock Twin Sunflower!
Sun-starved? Twin Sunflowers burp up twice the sun per square!

Fight Dr. Zomboss!
Defeat the diabolical Dr. Zomboss in this bygone battle of Ancient Egypt

Unlock Kernelpult!
Can Kernelpult deal damage AND stun zombies? You'd butter believe it!

Unlock Snapdragon!
Heat things up with Snapdragon's fiery attacks that hit multiple lanes at a time!

Unlock Spikeweed!
Damage zombies and bust barrels with the indomitable Spikeweed!

ChallengeLevelQuestData.Description:
Beat Bonus Level PS-6-1!
Why not try PS-6 again but with more packages?

LevelQuestData.Description:
Unlock Spring Bean!
Swashbuckler got you on the ropes? Use Spring Bean to knock 'em back to Davy Jones' locker!

Unlock Coconut Cannon!
BOOM! Clear entire groups of zombies with each explosive shot from Coconut Cannon!

Half-way reward!
Keep it up champ, here's a few gems to keep you going

Unlock Threepeater!
Threepeater shoots down three lanes at once to triple your offensive firepower!

Unlock Squash!
Have you ever wanted to turn zombies into pancakes?

ChallengeLevelQuestData.Description:
Beat Bonus Level PS-15-1!
What if there were more airborne zombies...

LevelQuestData.Description:
Unlock Melon-pult!
Melon-Pult flings heavy damage melons down a lane, hitting groups of zombies!

ChallengeLevelQuestData.Description:
Beat Bonus Level PS-17-1!
Is this the same level..? Try out an unsodded-themed challenge!

Beat Bonus Level PS-17-2!
Try out an unsodded-themed challenge! Wait, I'm getting deja vu...

LevelQuestData.Description:
Unlock Cherry Bomb!
Cherry Bomb's overwhelming blast fries whole groups of foes across lanes!

Fight Dr. Zomboss!
Hammer the hateful Dr. Zomboss in this saltwater scrap of Pirate Seas

Unlock Split Pea!
Sneaky zombies creeping up from behind? Split Pea shoots forward AND back!

Unlock Chili Bean!
Chili bean destroys a foe and stuns the group behind it!

Unlock Pea Pod!
Pile up Pea Pods for massive firepower!

Unlock Lightning Reed!
Lightning Reed shocks multiple foes at high speeds and adjacent lanes!

Unlock Spikerock!
Strong enough to stand up to a Gargantuar, sharp enough to de-feet zombies!

Unlock Tall Nut!
Tall-Nut totally frustrates flying and hopping zombies! Serves 'em right!

Unlock Tumblweed!
Tumbleweeds roar off down the lane, bouncing off zombies and knocking them back!

Unlock Winter Melon!
Winter-Melon hits groups of zombies, deals heavy damage AND chills them out!

Unlock Electricitea!
Shock and electrocute zombies with Electrici-tea's herbal discharge!

Fight Dr. Zomboss
Attack the awful Dr. Zomboss in this desert duel of Wild West!
